test.note: Failures are pre-existing (DATABASE_URL not set, INBOUND_API_KEY not set, bun:test module errors). No new failures introduced by this milestone.

typecheck.note: 3 pre-existing errors: bun:test module resolution in test files. Verified same errors exist before milestone commits.

lint.note: 315 pre-existing errors + 969 warnings across 651 files. Lint on files changed by this milestone (send.ts, reply.ts, route.ts, next.config.ts, package.json) shows only pre-existing issues (noExplicitAny, noUnusedFunctionParameters). Verified by checking out pre-milestone commit.

appliedUpdates.description: Added DOCS_URL env var note to environment.md: documents the dual-default behavior between next.config.ts (Mintlify URL) and lib/config/app-url.ts (self-referential /docs), explaining the redirect chain that makes both work.

rejectedObservations.observation: AGENTS.md already documents waitUntil replacement pattern correctly
